title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Cyient - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Cyient - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Cyient, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Allahabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Cyient:
Cyient is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cyient!
